miniCaseStudy.scenario: A learner sleeps late on weekdays and feels tired at school or work.
miniCaseStudy.analysis: Late light, late caffeine, and stress push the body clock later and reduce deep sleep quality.
miniCaseStudy.takeaway: Small routine changes can improve sleep timing and next-day concentration.
